name: NovaStore
releaseNotes: Restores the NovaStore v0.1.4-style installer capability for app installs and updates by adding REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKAGES while keeping the modern release-signed, non-debuggable store identity. Keeps the ACTION_VIEW + APK MIME + FileProvider + explicit installer target + ClipData handoff, SHA-256/size verification, no boot or notification permission, no broad package query, and no install-session API. Moves signed catalog refresh to raw.githubusercontent.com to avoid GitHub Contents API 403 failures.
